description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a rectangular boundary wall and lush landscaping. The property features a driveway with a parked car, a main entrance flanked by greenery, and a backyard with a swimming pool and a covered patio area. The house has a flat roof, large windows, and several outdoor living spaces, including a wooden deck and a small garden shed. The layout is open, with visible interior rooms and a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor areas. The exterior is primarily white with natural wood and stone accents, and the landscaping includes hedges, trees, and shrubs for privacy and aesthetics.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yard, pool, and multiple outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with car, lush landscaping, and a glimpse of the backyard pool.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, covered patio, and open backyard with garden shed and greenery.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage, driveway, and the transition between the front and back yards with visible hedges.
description_view_3: Alternate front/side view emphasizing the main entrance, driveway, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
